Fix toolbar About button not appearing

AddAction's 4th arg is toolTipText (invisible), 5th is the visible
text label. "About" was only passed as the tooltip so the button
rendered with no icon and no text. Pass it for both args.

Add parameterized project routes with UUID-based URLs (#240)

Change the project route from `/project` to `/project/:id` so each
project is addressable by a unique ID in the URL. When clicking
"Create Project", a UUID is generated via `crypto.randomUUID()` and
used in the navigation path. This is step 1 of #237 (local project
storage with IndexedDB).

- Update route definition in App.tsx to `/project/:id`
- Generate UUID on "Create Project" click in HomePage
- Add `useParams` mock to test setup for project ID
- Update all e2e tests to use `/project/test-id` or UUID pattern matching

Add MySpace creator pages + decouple frontend for Vercel deployment

  for cross-origin requests
- StoreProfileResource extended with theme data and stripe_publishable_key
- StorePage reads theme from API response instead of window.drupalSettings
- StripePayment reads key from VITE_STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY env var
- Vite build uses content-hashed filenames for Vercel cache busting
- vercel.json with SPA rewrites, redirects, and cache headers
- CORS config updated for rareimagery.net production domain
- settings.php updated with api.rareimagery.net trusted host and
  cross-origin cookie settings (SameSite=None, Secure)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix focus steal: use focusin event + blur() for immediate interception

- document.addEventListener('focusin') fires instantly when iframe steals focus
- Immediately blur() the iframe + refocus body
- Keep setInterval(100ms) as backup

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix landing page nav scroll: remove bad overflow-x on card stack, use window.scrollTo

overflow-x: hidden on .lp-card-stack silently sets overflow-y to auto (CSS spec),
making it a scroll container — scrollIntoView then scrolled the card stack instead
of the window, breaking the scroll card animations.

Fix: remove overflow-x from .lp-card-stack, switch nav clicks to window.scrollTo
with explicit nav offset so the window scrolls (not any nested container).

commit.message:
fix: DBAL seed idempotency — use caller-supplied id on INSERT, skip conflicts

- sql_adapter_helpers: buildInsertSql/jsonToParams now include the id field
  from the request body when provided, instead of always auto-generating via
  DB DEFAULT. Enables seed data to use fixed UUIDs for deterministic records.
- seed_loader_action: treat ErrorCode::Conflict (duplicate primary key) as
  'skipped' rather than 'failed' — makes repeated seeding on restart clean
- on_user_created.json: fix ${event.userId} → ${event.id} (User entity uses
  id as primary key, not userId; unresolved template created literal
  '${event.userId}' records in DB)

v8.3: Dynamic multi-model router + looping intelligence animation

- Dynamic fallback chains ensure graceful degradation
- 3-phase search animation: init → 20 intelligence streams (loop) → synthesis
- Streams include: satellite, port traffic, AIS maritime, geopolitical, freight, forex, forward curve, OSINT, supply chain, Asian demand, and more
- Auto-scroll with fade effect during analysis
- Stream counter shows processed sources in real-time

fix: PNG export not downloading on wasm - proper async buffer mapping

map_async callback. The async task yields via setTimeout until the
flag is set, then reads the mapped buffer, encodes PNG, and triggers
the browser download.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix GPU pass registration and add LIT tests for air-to-rocdl (#1365)

The GPU passes (air-to-rocdl, air-gpu-outlining) were added in cc73706c
but never registered with the pass manager. Passes.cpp only called
GEN_PASS_REGISTRATION for Passes.h.inc (non-GPU passes), not for
GPUPasses.h.inc. As a result, `air-opt -air-to-rocdl` failed with
"Unknown command line argument" despite the pass being compiled and
linked into the binary.

Fix:
- Add conditional GPU pass registration in Passes.cpp when
  AIR_ENABLE_GPU=1, using named namespaces to avoid shadowing
  the registerPasses() function from both .h.inc files.
- Add `gpu` LIT feature flag (controlled by AIR_ENABLE_GPU cmake
  option) so GPU tests are skipped when GPU support is disabled.

Tests:
- air_to_rocdl.mlir: verifies air.launch/segment/herd -> gpu.launch
  with correct grid/block dims, segment/herd unwrapped
- air_gpu_outlining.mlir: verifies gpu.launch -> gpu.launch_func +
  gpu.module with gpu.func kernel attribute

commit.message:
fix(auth): remove skipBrowserRedirect to fix bad_oauth_state error

The PKCE state was expiring because skipBrowserRedirect:true caused
Supabase to return the URL without properly managing the state flow.
Letting Supabase handle the redirect directly fixes the OAuth state
mismatch. Also added error param handling in Auth.tsx and cleaned up
the unnecessary grace period in WorkspaceSwitch.

commit.message:
fix(voice): enterprise hardening of AI Voice Settings tab

- Fix Generate Test Audio / Stream buttons never firing: they were trapped
  in an else{} block that never executed because window.VoiceSettingsManager
  (the class constructor) is always truthy
- Add Redis caching (1h TTL) to voices endpoint: eliminates ElevenLabs API
  round-trip on every tab visit; global key users share cache, own-key
  users get isolated cache per company
- VoiceSettingsManager: add AbortController fetch timeouts (10-30s)
- VoiceSettingsManager: auto-retry voice load once on failure after 3s
- VoiceSettingsManager: revoke blob URLs on each preview to prevent memory leaks
- VoiceSettingsManager: show preview error state on play button for 3s
- VoiceSettingsManager: show save error in indicator (was silently swallowed)
- VoiceSettingsManager: show loading spinner on Refresh button
